steps.title: Substitute x = 11 into the function
steps.content: The problem defines $f(x) = 4x^2$ and asks for $f(11)$. We substitute $x = 11$ directly into the function definition: $$f(11) = 4(11)^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the arithmetic
steps.content: We calculate $(11)^2 = 121$, then $f(11) = 4 \cdot 121 = 484$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
